title: EC2 native_sim/native/64 picolibc build broken on aarch64
description: The EC2 instance i-04b202fa2d3dcfa8f (aarch64 Amazon Linux) has broken picolibc builds for native_sim/native/64 targets. Errors include picolibc.h not found, autoconf.h race conditions, limits.h include_next failures. Root cause: parallel ninja race with header generation or missing toolchain setup for picolibc on ARM64 host. Use GitHub Actions CI (x86_64) for native_sim builds instead.
close_reason: Meson added to EC2 ARM64 workflow deps; 3 codereview passes (1 finding fixed, 2 clean) completed with all issues resolved; picolibc.h, autoconf.h, limits.h errors addressed for native_sim/native/64 on aarch64
